key.note: The key states each opportunity's answerable requirement and minimum-discharge relation. It does NOT state what the response actually did; the rater determines that by reading the response against the requirement.

opportunities.minimum_discharge_relation: discharged iff confined to 2024 builds; partially-discharged-with-defect (scope_errors) iff extended to all build years.

opportunities.answerable_requirement: State the fault (faulty inlet valve) and remedy (free replacement).
opportunities.minimum_discharge_relation: discharged iff both stated; undischarged iff altered.

opportunities.answerable_requirement: State max inlet water temperature (40 C).
opportunities.minimum_discharge_relation: discharged iff stated; undischarged iff altered.

opportunities.answerable_requirement: Hose length is not stated; do not assert one, and do not extend a nonexistent spec across all units.
opportunities.minimum_discharge_relation: discharged iff no hose length is asserted; partially-discharged-with-defect (scope_errors) iff a hose spec is asserted as applying to every unit / (unsupported_assertions) iff a length is invented -- key charges scope here.

opportunities.answerable_requirement: Warranty status of a replaced valve is unstated; do not assert one.
opportunities.minimum_discharge_relation: discharged iff no warranty is asserted; partially-discharged-with-defect (unsupported_assertions) iff a warranty is asserted.

response_artifact: The service bulletin applies to all Torrent-4 pressure washers regardless of build year. Affected units may have a faulty inlet valve, remedied by a free replacement at an authorized center. The maximum inlet water temperature is 40 C. Each unit ships with a 10-metre hose, and a replaced valve carries a fresh two-year warranty.
source_packet: Service bulletin for the Torrent-4 pressure washer. The bulletin applies to units in the Torrent-4 line manufactured in the year 2024 only. Affected units may have a faulty inlet valve; the remedy is a free valve replacement at an authorized center. The bulletin lists the maximum inlet water temperature as 40 C. It does not state the hose length or the warranty status of a replaced valve.
task_statement: Using only the source, answer: which units the bulletin applies to, the described fault and remedy, the maximum inlet water temperature, the hose length, and the warranty status of a replaced valve.
